description: This file defines URL routing for a Django REST Framework backend, including viewset registration and URL patterns.

classes.name: DefaultRouter
classes.description: Router class from Django REST Framework used to automatically generate URL patterns for viewsets.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Method of DefaultRouter to register a viewset with a URL prefix and basename.

methods.name: path
methods.description: Function to define a URL pattern in Django.

methods.name: include
methods.description: Function to include other URLconfs in Django URL patterns.
